name: Kok
description: Represents the head. It is the first letter of the alphabet and represents the source of knowledge and consciousness.

name: Sam
description: Represents hair. Symbolizes the covering and beauty of the head.

name: Lai
description: Represents the forehead. Symbolizes destiny and intellect.

name: Mit
description: Represents the eye. Symbolizes vision, perception, and observation.

name: Pa
description: Represents the eyelash. Symbolizes protection of vision.

name: Na
description: Represents the ear. Symbolizes hearing and receptiveness.

name: Chil
description: Represents the lips or mouth. Symbolizes speech, communication, and expression.

name: Til
description: Represents saliva. Symbolizes digestion and the chemical spark of life.

name: Khou
description: Represents the throat. Symbolizes the origin of voice and vocal sound production.

name: Ngou
description: Represents the vocal throat passage. Associated with deep throat consonant sounds.

name: Thou
description: Represents the chest. Symbolizes courage, respiration, and the heart.

name: Wai
description: Represents the navel. Symbolizes connection, birth, and origin.

name: Yang
description: Represents the backbone or spine. Symbolizes strength, stability, and structure.

name: Huk
description: Represents the lower spine and joints. Symbolizes physical flexibility and movement.

name: Un
description: Represents the skin. Symbolizes the boundary of the body and sense of touch.

name: Ee
description: Represents blood. Symbolizes the life force circulating through the body.

name: Pham
description: Represents the placenta or seat. Symbolizes birth, nurturing, and station in life.

name: Atiya
description: Represents the sky or space. The only primary letter not named after a physical body part, symbolizing the cosmic context of life.
